description: Packaging & Distribution (MVP Release Prep) Goal: Fulfill the non-functional requirement of portability ("Single executable/folder distribution - No Python install required"). * Task: Integrate PyInstaller or Nuitka to compile the Python application and its environment into a standalone executable (IcarusSentinel.exe). * Task: Create an installer script or .zip release structure that bundles the compiled app, required DLLs, and a default configuration. * Task: Add a versioning system and an "About" dialog to the UI.
